text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me... It's just that I've had a headache for
a little while. I don't think it's anything to—

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all units. Did you hear that? Escort Her
Highness to the nearest medical facility at once!

text_block_list.name: Security Officer
text_block_list.text:
Captain! Transport preparations are complete!
We've also booked Her Highness in for a
complete medical evaluation!

text_block_list.name: Voice on the Radio
text_block_list.text:
This is Eagle Squad. Now dispatching chopper to
school rooftop. ETA is in two minutes. Over.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Copy. Everyone, take your positions! Operation
Doctor's Visit is—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! By the power vested in my name, I hereby
order you to abort this operation at once!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We must not cause an undue ruckus at the
academy. I have no need for medical treatment at
this time.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Understood, Your Highness! My apologies. All
units, stand down! Return to default positions!
choice_data_list: L-let's just see how you feel in a bit.
L-let's just see how you feel in a bit.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ooouch... All that shouting has got my head
pounding again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's migraine doesn't go away, however,
and she struggles with the pain for a while.
